productDisplayName: Nike Men Chroma Thong Black Flip Flops
description: Style Note flip flops have been in vogue since time immemorial. The nike Chroma Thong, true to its name, will add a splash of colour to your feet and life, transporting you to a world of absolute comfort and delight. They have a good grip, are comfortable, and can be worn with almost any kind of casual outfits. Product Details Broad thong style straps for improved comfort made of synthetic leather Synthetic fabric toe separator for a soft feel Strap backing made of synthetic fabric for enhanced comfort Logo on strap Stitched detailing on straps for added style Foam footbed with synthetic upper layer for all day comfort with the logo on heel Stitched detailing on the periphery Thong construction to hold the forefoot in place Herringbone pattern for good gripWarranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount) Material and Care Synthetic Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in sunlight
